rationale: Title X more precisely characterizes the study population ('drug-resistant'), highlights the European multicentre scope relevant to Europace's readership, and uses the cleaner 'versus' comparative structure typical of the journal, making it both more informative and better fitted to Europace style.
loser_weakness: Title Y omits the clinically important 'drug-resistant' qualifier, uses a weaker gerund opening ('Comparing'), and lacks the European scope signal, reducing its informativeness, precision, and journal fit.
